case_title: HOLLAND, MATTIE RUTH vs. LINTZ, LULU PEARL

ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, O'LEARY, MICHAEL FRANCIS (051270), ARB-5 MAILED
MOTION TO EXTEND ARBITRATION PERIOD TO & INCLUDING JAN. 21, 1994, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT LINTZ, LULU PEARL HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 04

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 04, MOTION TO EXTEND ARBITRATION PERIOD TO & INCLUDING JAN. 21, 1994, CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER ATTORNEY FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT LINTZ TO PREPARE ORDER.
